## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call between StackGen and GrowthX to explore potential collaboration on content marketing and growth strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/36g4UxJAUKxzxsVFU548YRtYSoeUFz4W?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [StackGen operates in a highly technical B2B dev tooling space, seeking to improve content marketing ROI](https://fathom.video/share/36g4UxJAUKxzxsVFU548YRtYSoeUFz4W?tab=summary&timestamp=484.0)
  - [GrowthX specializes in building organic content engines, with a focus on technical content for B2B SaaS companies](https://fathom.video/share/36g4UxJAUKxzxsVFU548YRtYSoeUFz4W?tab=summary&timestamp=264.0)
  - [StackGen has existing content production but is open to exploring ways to amplify their efforts and improve metrics](https://fathom.video/share/36g4UxJAUKxzxsVFU548YRtYSoeUFz4W?tab=summary&timestamp=826.0)
  - [Next steps involve GrowthX analyzing StackGen's website and providing specific recommendations for improvement](https://fathom.video/share/36g4UxJAUKxzxsVFU548YRtYSoeUFz4W?tab=summary&timestamp=854.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Expertise and Approach

  - [Founded by Marcel (CEO), known for Arian Gara workflows for fast, high-quality content production](https://fathom.video/share/36g4UxJAUKxzxsVFU548YRtYSoeUFz4W?tab=summary&timestamp=132.0)
  - [Recently closed Series A funding, now at 70 employees](https://fathom.video/share/36g4UxJAUKxzxsVFU548YRtYSoeUFz4W?tab=summary&timestamp=164.0)
  - [Specializes in technical content creation, particularly for B2B SaaS and DevTool companies](https://fathom.video/share/36g4UxJAUKxzxsVFU548YRtYSoeUFz4W?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Uses AI-driven workflows and a team of experts to scale content production](https://fathom.video/share/36g4UxJAUKxzxsVFU548YRtYSoeUFz4W?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Focuses on editorial content first, then expands to other areas (newsletters, lead magnets, social)](https://fathom.video/share/36g4UxJAUKxzxsVFU548YRtYSoeUFz4W?tab=summary&timestamp=264.0)
  - [Aims to help clients think and act like publishers, creating highly valuable content for specific personas](https://fathom.video/share/36g4UxJAUKxzxsVFU548YRtYSoeUFz4W?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)

### StackGen's Current Marketing Efforts

  - [Using a third-party service provider for content production](https://fathom.video/share/36g4UxJAUKxzxsVFU548YRtYSoeUFz4W?tab=summary&timestamp=242.0)
  - [Increased content publishing velocity in recent months](https://fathom.video/share/36g4UxJAUKxzxsVFU548YRtYSoeUFz4W?tab=summary&timestamp=1038.0)
  - [Invested heavily in marketing starting \~4-5 months ago (Jan-Feb 2025)](https://fathom.video/share/36g4UxJAUKxzxsVFU548YRtYSoeUFz4W?tab=summary&timestamp=1047.0)
  - [Current ROI on content marketing efforts is low, seeking improvement](https://fathom.video/share/36g4UxJAUKxzxsVFU548YRtYSoeUFz4W?tab=summary&timestamp=848.0)
  - [Planning website revamps to enhance performance](https://fathom.video/share/36g4UxJAUKxzxsVFU548YRtYSoeUFz4W?tab=summary&timestamp=1101.0)
  - [New CMO (John) joined \~2 months ago, leading renewed marketing efforts](https://fathom.video/share/36g4UxJAUKxzxsVFU548YRtYSoeUFz4W?tab=summary&timestamp=1111.0)

### Technical Content Examples from GrowthX

  - [Zuplo (API management): Blog content and AI search strategy, including code examples](https://fathom.video/share/36g4UxJAUKxzxsVFU548YRtYSoeUFz4W?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [BAPI (AI voice): Use case pages with interactive AI agents](https://fathom.video/share/36g4UxJAUKxzxsVFU548YRtYSoeUFz4W?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Abnormal Security/AI (email security): Glossary enrichment, blog content, video repurposing](https://fathom.video/share/36g4UxJAUKxzxsVFU548YRtYSoeUFz4W?tab=summary&timestamp=768.0)

### StackGen's Competitive Landscape

  - [Direct competitors: Spacelift, Harness, Control Monkey](https://fathom.video/share/36g4UxJAUKxzxsVFU548YRtYSoeUFz4W?tab=summary&timestamp=1272.0)
  - [Emerging AI-focused competitors: Traversal, Resolve.ai](https://fathom.video/share/36g4UxJAUKxzxsVFU548YRtYSoeUFz4W?tab=summary&timestamp=1283.0)
  - [StackGen positioning as a leader in a specific market segment](https://fathom.video/share/36g4UxJAUKxzxsVFU548YRtYSoeUFz4W?tab=summary&timestamp=1248.0)
  - [Upcoming launch of a major "agentic layer" on their platform](https://fathom.video/share/36g4UxJAUKxzxsVFU548YRtYSoeUFz4W?tab=summary&timestamp=1246.0)

### Content Performance Metrics

  - [StackGen's authority score is improving but not satisfactory](https://fathom.video/share/36g4UxJAUKxzxsVFU548YRtYSoeUFz4W?tab=summary&timestamp=1031.0)
  - [Upward trend in content metrics since October 2024, with significant push from January 2025](https://fathom.video/share/36g4UxJAUKxzxsVFU548YRtYSoeUFz4W?tab=summary&timestamp=1043.0)
  - [Exploring both SEO and AI-driven search optimization (GEO)](https://fathom.video/share/36g4UxJAUKxzxsVFU548YRtYSoeUFz4W?tab=summary&timestamp=1063.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to analyze StackGen's website, blog, and content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/36g4UxJAUKxzxsVFU548YRtYSoeUFz4W?tab=summary&timestamp=1298.0)
  - [Provide specific recommendations focusing on:](https://fathom.video/share/36g4UxJAUKxzxsVFU548YRtYSoeUFz4W?tab=summary&timestamp=1298.0)
      - [Improving authority score](https://fathom.video/share/36g4UxJAUKxzxsVFU548YRtYSoeUFz4W?tab=summary&timestamp=1031.0)
      - [Increasing traffic](https://fathom.video/share/36g4UxJAUKxzxsVFU548YRtYSoeUFz4W?tab=summary&timestamp=1022.0)
      - [Enhancing return on investment](https://fathom.video/share/36g4UxJAUKxzxsVFU548YRtYSoeUFz4W?tab=summary&timestamp=848.0)
      - [Targeting valuable keywords](https://fathom.video/share/36g4UxJAUKxzxsVFU548YRtYSoeUFz4W?tab=summary&timestamp=1220.0)
  - [Schedule a follow-up meeting next week with John (StackGen's CMO) to discuss findings and potential collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/36g4UxJAUKxzxsVFU548YRtYSoeUFz4W?tab=summary&timestamp=1311.0)
